stemHtml: If the average True Airspeed (TAS) at cruising level between reporting points varies by _____ from that given in the flight plan, the appropriate Air Traffic Services unit shall be so informed.

options.a: Plus or minus 5% of the TAS, deviation in time by more than 2 min.
options.b: At least 2% of the TAS, deviation in time by more than 5 min.
